prompt: Create a realistic lifestyle fashion portrait in a vertical 9:16 aspect ratio. Show a young East Asian woman with short wavy black bob with wispy bangs standing outside a chic European-style café, leaning casually near a dark green storefront and glass window. She wears exactly 5 main outfit pieces: muted olive green baseball cap, white strapless ribbed tube top, olive green denim short overalls worn with one shoulder strap fastened and the other side dropped diagonally, olive green low-top canvas sneakers with white laces, and delicate gold jewelry consisting of layered necklaces and a bracelet. Her pose is relaxed and elegant: one hand tucked into the shorts pocket, the other arm hanging naturally, legs crossed at the ankles, looking directly at the camera with a soft neutral expression. Place exactly 4 visible café/table elements beside her: a small round white marble bistro table with black cast-iron pedestal base, a black quilted handbag with pearl handle and gold clasp on the table, a disposable takeaway coffee cup with brown sleeve and black lid, and a woven rattan café chair. Background details should include dark green painted wood panels, reflective café windows, warm interior lamps, blurred shelves and glassware, and soft urban sidewalk paving. Use natural warm daylight mixed with cozy café interior glow, shallow depth of field, premium editorial fashion photography, realistic skin texture, refined color grading, subtle bokeh, and a clean luxury composition where no object competes with the subject. Keep the image uncluttered, no visible text, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands, and preserve a high-end street-style mood.
